summary: Complete implementation of reify-kernel-occt OCCT FFI binding. Set up cxx bridge infrastructure (build.rs, C++ wrapper, ffi.rs). Implemented OcctKernel with full GeometryKernel trait: Box/Cylinder/Sphere primitives, Union/Difference/Intersection booleans, Fillet, Translate/Rotate transforms, Volume/Area/Centroid/BBox queries, STEP export, and tessellation with computed normals. All 9 previously-ignored boundary4_geometry::occt_tests now pass. OCCT from FreeCAD snap (7.7) with .cargo/run-with-occt.sh runner for LD_LIBRARY_PATH. 83 tests pass (74 baseline + 9 new OCCT), 0 ignored, 0 failures.
